name: Oklo Inc.
content: Oklo Inc. is an advanced fission technology company focused on developing fast fission reactors to provide clean, reliable, and affordable energy at scale. The company designs and builds the Aurora powerhouse, a micro-reactor capable of generating power from recycled nuclear fuel as well as fresh fuel. By utilizing a fast neutron spectrum, Oklo aims to reduce nuclear waste and enhance energy efficiency. Headquartered in Santa Clara, California, Oklo is pioneering a business model that involves selling power directly to customers through long-term power purchase agreements, targeting data centers, industrial sites, and remote communities.
